hero.name: Syah Putra Nugraha
hero.title: Building Digital Experiences with Precision.
hero.subtitle: Specialist in web application development, digitalization of work systems, and ready to contribute as a professional developer.

about.title: About Me
about.content:
I am a Full Stack Web Developer with experience in building web applications focused on functionality and efficiency. I have a strong background in creating REST APIs, authentication systems, admin dashboards, and responsive design using modern stacks (React.js, Node.js, Express.js) as well as PHP/MySQL.

My cross-industry experience in manufacturing and construction provides a unique perspective on problem-solving, team communication, and deep understanding of digital business needs.

exp1.desc: Building custom web applications for various clients, focusing on business process efficiency.

exp2.desc: Digitalization of project work systems, field database management, and operational coordination.

exp3.role: Personal Assistant & General Staff / Digital Documentation
exp3.desc: Managing digital documentation and providing corporate administrative system support.

exp4.desc: IT system support and operational administration.

exp5.desc: IT infrastructure maintenance, server management, and internal technical support.

proj1.title: Construction Project Monitoring
proj1.desc: Home construction progress monitoring application with progress dashboards and daily reports.

proj2.title: Event Organizer Showcase
proj2.desc: EO and catering service promotion website with service catalogs and booking features.

proj3.title: Internal Recruitment Application
proj3.desc: Internal system for managing applicant data and HR dashboard at PT. OTICS Indonesia.

proj4.title: Company Profile Website
proj4.desc: Business profile website for Wisata Ngaprak Bandung with destination gallery.
